summary: Backup Code Login and RBAC Features Testing Complete. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backup Code Recovery - Endpoint exists and returns proper errors
Backup Code Recovery - Invalid email returns 400 with proper message
Backup Code Recovery - Invalid code returns 400 with proper message
Backup Code Recovery - Non-superadmin users cannot use backup codes
VIEWER Role - Login successful with role='viewer'
VIEWER Role - Has read_only=True permission flag
VIEWER Role - Can read items (GET /api/items)
VIEWER Role - Can read customers (GET /api/customers)
STAFF Role - Login successful with role='staff'
STAFF Role - Can read items (GET /api/items)
STAFF Role - Can read customers (GET /api/customers)
STAFF Role - Has items permission
STAFF Role - Has invoices permission
Role Badge - Superadmin returns role='superadmin' (purple badge)
Role Badge - Viewer returns role='viewer' (gray badge)
Role Badge - Staff returns role='staff' (amber badge)
Default Permissions - All roles configured in permission-modules endpoint
Default Permissions - Viewer has read_only=True in default permissions
UI: Login page shows 'Forgot Password? Use Backup Code' link
UI: Backup code modal opens with email and code input fields
UI: Backup code modal has 'Recover Account' and 'Back to Login' buttons
UI: VIEWER sees 'View Only' badge in sidebar
UI: VIEWER sees 'View-Only Mode' banner on Items page
UI: VIEWER does NOT see 'Add Product' button
UI: VIEWER does NOT see 'Actions' dropdown menu
UI: STAFF sees 'Staff' badge in sidebar (amber color)
UI: STAFF does NOT see read-only banner (has write access)
UI: SUPERADMIN sees 'Super Admin' badge in sidebar (purple color)
critical_code_review_comments: Backup code recovery endpoint properly restricts to superadmin only
RBAC implementation correctly differentiates between viewer (read-only) and staff (limited write)
Role badge colors correctly configured: superadmin=purple, admin=blue, manager=green, staff=amber, viewer=gray
ReadOnlyBanner component properly shows for viewer role
ActionGuard component properly hides action buttons for viewer role
seed_data_creation: Used existing test accounts: viewer@test.com and staff@test.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backup code login and RBAC features fully tested. The backup code recovery endpoint (POST /api/auth/recover-with-backup-code) only works for superadmin users. VIEWER role has read_only=True flag and sees 'View-Only Mode' banner with hidden action buttons. STAFF role has limited write access (can create invoices, customers, orders) without read-only restrictions. Role badges display correctly: superadmin=purple, staff=amber, viewer=gray.

backup_code_login.ui_link: Visible on login page as 'Forgot Password? Use Backup Code'
backup_code_login.modal: Opens with email and backup code input fields

viewer_role_rbac.badge: Gray badge with 'View Only' text in sidebar
viewer_role_rbac.banner: View-Only Mode banner visible on Items page
viewer_role_rbac.hidden_actions: Add Product button and Actions dropdown hidden

staff_role_rbac.badge: Amber badge with 'Staff' text in sidebar
